name: weekly-review
description: Weekly review of git commits and memory notes across all workspaces

tasks.prompt:
Summarize this week's activity.

1. Run `git log --since='7 days ago' --oneline`
2. Run `git diff --name-only HEAD~$(git log --since='7 days ago' --oneline | wc -l) HEAD 2>/dev/null`
3. Read any memory/*.md files from this week

Output format:

## Git Commits (7 days)
[commits]

## Modified Files
[files]

## Weekly Summary
[3-5 sentences]

Create a weekly report from these workspace summaries.

{{collect.results}}

Format:
# Weekly Report — <date>

## Highlights
[top 3-5 accomplishments]

## Per-Project Status
[summary per workspace]

## Next Week
[priorities]
